overall.description: First-person exploration of an abandoned post-Soviet urban environment from a video game. The player walks along cracked pavement past a derelict polyclinic building, transitioning from an open overgrown plaza into a debris-filled covered walkway beneath the structure, under a gloomy overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned urban plaza with pedestrian crossing

events.description: pedestrian crossing sign passes behind trees and exits view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past the pedestrian crossing sign toward the abandoned building complex, surveying the derelict surroundings

entered.detail: blue and white Soviet-era pedestrian crossing sign on a metal pole
large concrete Soviet-era medical facility with Cyrillic signage and broken windows
weathered pavement with weeds growing through cracks
leafless and dying trees with brown foliage scattered among the branches

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a desolate urban plaza with a pedestrian crossing sign visible on the left. The camera moves forward along cracked concrete pavement toward a massive abandoned polyclinic building on the right, surrounded by dead and dying trees under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown pathway alongside abandoned medical facility

agents.ego_description: continuing along the tree-lined path beside the derelict polyclinic, approaching the building entrance

entered.detail: rusted metal safety railings along the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Moving past the plaza, the path continues alongside the abandoned polyclinic which now dominates the right side of the frame. Metal railings appear in the distance on the left, and the pedestrian sign is left behind as the camera approaches the building's covered walkway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway entrance with structural columns and debris

events.description: entering the covered walkway beneath the building overhang, lighting dims significantly

agents.ego_description: moving into the shadowed covered area with broken glass scattered across the ground

entered.detail: thick concrete support pillars holding up the building overhang
shattered window glass and concrete fragments littering the walkway floor

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the open path into a dimly lit covered walkway beneath the polyclinic. Structural columns line the right side while metal railings run along the left edge. The ground becomes increasingly covered with broken glass and debris as the lighting shifts to shadowy and subdued.

scene_state.functional_zone: debris-filled covered corridor with metal railings and concrete barriers

events.description: ground becomes increasingly littered with large broken glass shards and rubble

agents.ego_description: navigating through the rubble-strewn covered walkway alongside the building, approaching a concrete barrier ahead

entered.detail: large rectangular concrete block obstructing the far end of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Deep inside the covered walkway, the camera continues past rows of structural columns while navigating through dense debris fields of broken glass. A concrete barrier becomes visible ahead in the distance, blocking the far end of the corridor as the path continues under the shadowed overhang.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate, open urban plaza into the oppressive shadows of a debris-strewn covered walkway. It begins by moving along cracked concrete pavement past a pedestrian crossing sign, heading toward a massive abandoned polyclinic flanked by dying trees under an overcast sky. As the camera advances, the polyclinic begins to dominate the right side of the frame, drawing the viewer closer to the building's entrance while metal railings appear on the left. The scene then shifts from the open air into a dimly lit corridor beneath the structure, where the lighting becomes subdued and the ground transforms into a field of broken glass. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the shadowed overhang, passing rows of structural columns toward a distant concrete barrier that blocks the end of the path.
